summary: Completed testing of new /api/transcribe endpoint using Sarvam Saaras v3. Backend APIs fully functional (19/19 tests passed). Frontend transcription display working with dual-language blocks. Some frontend login flow instability issues found.

ui_bugs.issue: OTP send button occasionally becomes unresponsive/disabled even with valid phone number
ui_bugs.symptoms: Button appears disabled, clicking doesn't trigger OTP flow

passed_tests: ✅ Backend /api/transcribe endpoint - processes audio, returns Hindi + English transcripts
✅ ChatLog storage with type='transcription', transcript_hi, transcript_en fields
✅ Auto bot response generation based on Hindi transcript content
✅ Chat history preserves transcription messages with proper structure
✅ Frontend mic button present with correct data-testid='chat-mic-btn'
✅ Hindi/English transcript sections with proper data-testids
✅ Text input and send button functionality intact
✅ MCP tool integration working with scheme queries
✅ All existing features: auth APIs, profile, schemes, chat history
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend login flow stability - OTP send button sometimes becomes disabled requiring page refresh. Otherwise transcription feature implementation is complete and working correctly.
